# Notion Template Gallery - Dashboards

**Source:** https://www.notion.com/templates
**Scraped:** 2026-04-21
**Scope:** dashboard-keyword search via `firecrawl_map` (category URL `/templates/category/dashboards` 404s)
**License:** Per-template - usually free/paid by individual makers.

Notion's "templates" are Notion PAGE STRUCTURES (databases + views), NOT web UI. Value for Clawmachine is limited to:
1. Information-architecture inspiration (how experienced Notion creators lay out a reseller/electronics ops flow)
2. Dark-mode cover-image + typography references (every Notion page has a hero cover)

There is no dark-mode carve-out; Notion's dashboard vibe is mostly light + cream. Skip this bucket for visual gold; consult it only for IA patterns.

## Top 10 Notion dashboards discovered

Ranked by specificity to the Clawmachine ops flow (inventory, job/task tracking, pipeline):

1. **Jobs Dashboard** (`/templates/jobs-dashboard`) - Clean Notion dashboard to track job applications from applied-to-offer. Useful for shape of status-column dashboards.
2. **Task Management Dashboard 141** (`/templates/task-management-dashboard-141`) - Emmanuel Ogwuma. All-in-one dashboard to manage tasks, goals, and schedules.
3. **Content & Social Media HQ** (`/templates/content-social-media-hq`) - Monitor content performance across platforms, track audience growth.
4. **Digital Product Seller Dashboard** (`/templates/digital-product-seller-dashboard`) - Solopreneurs/digital creators: products + content + promotional pipeline. Directly mirrors the reseller operator mental model.
5. **Advanced 3D Printing Management System** (`/templates/advanced-3d-printing-management-system`) - Makers / labs. Track projects, inventory, costs. Pattern source for "item -> diagnosis -> cost" flow.
6. **Applicant Tracker with Automations** (`/templates/applicant-tracker-with-automations`) - Database Automations example.
7. **Team Collaboration & Task Timeline** (`/templates/team-collaboration-task-timeline`) - Members + meetings + tasks + departments with a visual task timeline.
8. **Grant Tracking & Management System** (`/templates/grant-tracking-management-system`) - Deadline/relationship/reporting tracker. Similar surface to RMA / repair / vendor.
9. **Law Desk - Small Law Firm OS** (`/templates/law-desk-small-law-firm-operating-system`) - Clients + cases + tasks + billables. Analogue for the buy-side-only BS Exchange operator flow.
10. **Execution OS** (`/templates/execution-os`) - All-in-one productivity system track/execute/finish.

## Categories discovered

- `/category/dashboards` - 404, but underlying tag works via text search
- `/category/workflows-automations` - adjacent category worth inspecting for automation patterns
- `/category/best-design-system-templates-for-ux-ui-designers` - IA-only, design-system pages in Notion

## Notes

- Notion templates do NOT carry web-UI source code - they are JSON exports of Notion's page tree.
- Official API: `api.notion.com/v1` - for syncing Clawmachine state INTO Notion as a dashboard. Each template serves as reference shape.
- No previews downloaded (deep limitations on extracting rendered page-state without auth).
